14:T6e6,flowchart LR
    APP[Applications] --> S3API(["S3 API"])

    subgraph DIST["Distributed RustFS"]
        direction TB
        subgraph N1["Node 1"]
            direction LR
            S3a[S3]
            subgraph OL1["Object Layer"]
                direction TB
                C1[Cache]
                K1[Compression]
                E1[Encryption]
                B1["Erasure Code · Bitrot"]
            end
            SL1["Storage Layer"]
            J1[("JBOD / FS disks")]
            S3a -->|Object API| OL1
            OL1 -->|Storage API| SL1
            SL1 <--> J1
        end
        subgraph N2["Node 2"]
            direction LR
            S3b[S3]
            subgraph OL2["Object Layer"]
                direction TB
                C2[Cache]
                K2[Compression]
                E2[Encryption]
                B2["Erasure Code · Bitrot"]
            end
            SL2["Storage Layer"]
            J2[("JBOD / FS disks")]
            S3b -->|Object API| OL2
            OL2 -->|Storage API| SL2
            SL2 <--> J2
        end
        NN["Node n ..."]
        N1 <-->|Internal RESTful API| N2
        N2 <-->|Internal RESTful API| NN
    end

    S3API --> N1
    S3API --> N2
    S3API --> NN

    classDef server fill:#dbeafe,stroke:#3b82f6,stroke-width:2px,color:#1e293b;
    classDef store fill:#dcfce7,stroke:#22c55e,stroke-width:2px,color:#1e293b;
    classDef svc fill:#eef2ff,stroke:#6366f1,stroke-width:2px,color:#1e293b;
    classDef muted fill:#f3f4f6,stroke:#9ca3af,stroke-width:2px,color:#1e293b;
    classDef accent fill:#fae8ff,stroke:#c026d3,stroke-width:2px,color:#1e293b;
    class APP,NN muted
    class S3API accent
    class S3a,S3b,SL1,SL2 server
    class C1,K1,E1,B1,C2,K2,E2,B2 svc
    class J1,J2 storea:["$","$Lc",null,{"toc":[{"depth":2,"url":"#scaling-solution-overview","title":"Scaling Solution Overview"},{"depth":2,"url":"#pre-scaling-preparation","title":"Pre-Scaling This document is based on the latest RustFS version. Please perform full data backup before scaling operations. For production environments, it's recommended to contact RustFS technical support engineers for solution review."}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h2","id":"scaling-solution-overview","children":"Scaling Solution Overview"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"RustFS supports horizontal scaling by adding new storage pools (Server Pool). Each new storage pool must meet:"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Nodes within the storage pool must use ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"consecutive hostnames"}]," (e.g., node5-node8)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Single storage pool must use ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"same specifications"}]," of disks (type/capacity/quantity)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["New storage pools must maintain ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"time synchronization"}]," and ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"network connectivity"}]," with existing clusters"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L13",null,{"chart":"$14"}],"\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f","\n","$L20","\n","$L21","\n","$L22","\n","$L23","\n","$L24","\n","$L25","\n","$L26","\n","$L27","\n","$L28","\n","$L29","\n","$L2a","\n","$L2b","\n","$L2c","\n","$L2d","\n","$L2e","\n","$L2f","\n","$L30","\n","$L31","\n","$L32","\n","$L33","\n","$L34","\n","$L35","\n","$L36","\n","$L37"]}],"$undefined"]}]

19:["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h3","id":"12-system-environment-check","children":"1.2 System Environment Check"}]
1a:["$","$L38",null,{"className":"shiki shiki-themes github-light /></svg>","children":["$","$L39",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#6A737D","--shiki-dark":"#6A737D"},"children":"# add new storage pool to the existing; must match the hostname pattern used by the existing nodes byte for byte"}]}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#032F62","--shiki-dark":"#9ECBFF"},"children":"RUSTFS_ADDRESS=\":9000\""}]}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#032F62","--shiki-dark":"#9ECBFF"},"children":"RUSTFS_CONSOLE_ADDRESS=\":9001\""}]}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#032F62","--shiki-dark":"#9ECBFF"},"children":"EOF"}]}]]}]}]}]

2e:["$","p",null,{"children":["Open in the RustFS Console Performance menu, e.g. ",["$","$L57",null,{"href":"http://node1:9001/rustfs/console/performance","children":"http://node1:9001/rustfs/console/performance"}]," and check node join status in the Server List"]}]
2f:["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h3","id":"32-data-balance-verification","children":"3.2 Data Balance Verification"}]
30:["$","p",null,{"children":"New objects are placed across pools according to available capacity. Check per-pool usage in the RustFS Console; it should trend toward each storage pool's capacity ratio. Existing data is not moved automatically — to spread it across the new pool, start a rebalance from the Console and expect it to run in the background for a while."}]
31:["$","hr",null,{}]
32:["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h2","id":"important-notes","children":"Important Notes"}]
33:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Restart Scope"}],": Changing ",["$","code",null,{"children":"RUSTFS_VOLUMES"}]," (adding a storage pool) requires restarting all nodes so they agree on the new topology — restart them together during this operation. For routine binary upgrades or parameter changes, use a rolling restart (one node at a time) to avoid downtime."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Capacity Planning Recommendation"}],": Should plan next scaling when storage usage reaches 70%"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Performance Tuning Recommendations"}],":"]}],"\n"]}]
